zh.of, Midhurst, Sussex, England: 英國英格蘭素可米度爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Chapelle於1256年12月出生在英國素可米度爾斯特時，她的父親Bartholomew de la Chapelle32歲，母親Nichole26歲。她和John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1327年3月23日在英國英格蘭享年70歲。

zh-hans.of, Midhurst, Sussex, England: 英国英格兰素可米度爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Chapelle于1256年12月出生在英国素可米度爾斯特时，她的父亲Bartholomew de la Chapelle32岁，母亲Nichole26岁。她和John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1327年3月23日在英国英格兰享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chapelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Shortened form of French   Lachapelle  , a variant of 1 above.
French and Walloon: topographic name for someone living by a chapel, from French chapelle ‘chapel’, or a habitational name from any of several places in France and Belgium named (La) Chapelle.

variants.name: Lachapelle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Normand, Aurele, Gaston, Mignonne, Simonne, Adrien, Aime, Andree, Armand, Chantelle.
French: variant, with fused feminine definite article la, of Chapelle 2 ‘chapel’, or a habitational name from La Chapelle, the name of several places in various parts of France. Compare Chapelle 1.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Chapelle was born in December 1256, in Midhurst, Sussex, England, her father, Bartholomew de la Chapelle, was 32 and her mother, Nichole, was 26. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. She died on 23 March 1327, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Chapelle est née en décembre 1256, à Midhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Bartholomew de la Chapelle, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Nichole, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. Elle est décédée le 23 mars 1327, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Chapelle im Dezember 1256 in Midhurst, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew de la Chapelle 32 und ihre Mutter Nichole 26. Sie hatte mit John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. März 1327 im Alter von 70 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Chapelle è nata il nel dicembre 1256 nel Midhurst, Sussex, England, sua padre, Bartholomew de la Chapelle, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Nichole, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. Morì il 23 marzo 1327, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.Midhurst, Sussex, England: イギリススセックスミドハルスト
ja.lifeSummary: Joan Chapelleが1256年12月にイギリススセックスミドハルストで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de la Chapelleは32歳，母Nicholeは26歳であった。彼女はJohn de Bohun Lord of Midhurstとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1327年3月23日にイギリスイギリスで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Chapelle(이)가 1256년 12월 영국 수세스 미드후르스트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de la Chapelle(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Nichole(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1327년 3월 23일 영국 잉글랜드에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Chapelle nasceu em dezembro de 1256, em Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Bartholomew de la Chapelle, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Nichole, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. Ela faleceu em 23 de março de 1327, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Chapelle родилась декабрь 1256 г. в местности мидхурст, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de la Chapelle было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Nichole, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. Она умерла 23 марта 1327 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Chapelle nació en diciembre de 1256, en Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Bartholomew de la Chapelle, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Nichole, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con John de Bohun Lord of Midhurst. Murió el 23 de marzo de 1327, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 70 años.
